title: rosa × dumetorum subf. ramealis
intro: Rosa × dumetorum subf. ramealis, also known as the wild rose, is a plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family and is native to parts of Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum subf. ramealis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
